start.title: Period Start
start.description: Start of the export period in ISO 8601 datetime format.

end.title: Period End
end.description: End of the export period in ISO 8601 datetime format.

first.title: First Invoice
first.description: First invoice record in the exported period.

last.title: Last Invoice
last.description: Last invoice record in the exported period.

tax_total.title: Tax Total
tax_total.description: Sum of taxes in the period (Decimal 12,2).

amount_total.title: Amount Total
amount_total.description: Sum of total amounts in the period (Decimal 12,2).

discarded.title: Records Discarded
discarded.description: Whether any records were discarded ("S" or "N").

InvoiceExport.description: InvoiceExport contains summary data for an export of invoice records over a period.

issuer_tax_code.title: Issuer Tax Code
issuer_tax_code.description: Tax identification number of the invoice issuer.

InvoiceRecord.description: InvoiceRecord identifies a specific invoice in an export or summary.
